title: A Pilot’s Resolution
article_text: A tall pilot had a vast emotion when he smelled the stable air before a flight. He felt an urge to pursue his talent, but his prior injury was a rare problem. The enemy of his progress was merely a small gap in his training. He used to communicate with his team online about every phrase in the manual. They appointed a new leader to help with the resolution of the issue. His priority was to drink milk and stay stable before the flight. He had been planning for weeks to achieve his goal. If he felt pain, he would stop flying immediately. The settlement of the conflict was a huge relief for everyone. He said that the experience taught him a valuable lesson.

sentences.en: A tall pilot had a vast emotion when he smelled the stable air before a flight.
sentences.zh: 一位高大的飞行员在闻到飞行前稳定的空气时，感受到了一种巨大的情感。

words.eng_def: a person who flies an aircraft
very large in size or amount
a strong feeling such as love or anger
to notice something with your nose
not changing or likely to change

sentences.en: He felt an urge to pursue his talent, but his prior injury was a rare problem.
sentences.zh: 他感到一种冲动去追求自己的才能，但他之前的伤病是一个罕见的问题。

words.eng_def: a strong desire to do something
a natural ability to do something well
harm done to a person's body

sentences.en: The enemy of his progress was merely a small gap in his training.
sentences.zh: 他进步的敌人仅仅是他训练中的一个小差距。

words.eng_def: a person who hates or opposes another
a space or difference between two things

sentences.en: He used to communicate with his team online about every phrase in the manual.
sentences.zh: 他过去常常与团队在线沟通手册中的每一个短语。

words.eng_def: a group of words that form a unit

sentences.en: They appointed a new leader to help with the resolution of the issue.
sentences.zh: 他们任命了一位新领导来帮助解决这个问题。

words.eng_def: to choose someone for a job or position

sentences.en: His priority was to drink milk and stay stable before the flight.
sentences.zh: 他的首要任务是喝牛奶并在飞行前保持稳定。

words.eng_def: something that is more important than others
a white liquid from cows used as food

sentences.en: He had been planning for weeks to achieve his goal.
sentences.zh: 他几周以来一直在计划实现自己的目标。

words.eng_def: the act of deciding what to do

sentences.en: If he felt pain, he would stop flying immediately.
sentences.zh: 如果他感到疼痛，他会立即停止飞行。

sentences.en: The settlement of the conflict was a huge relief for everyone.
sentences.zh: 冲突的解决对每个人来说都是一个巨大的解脱。

sentences.en: He said that the experience taught him a valuable lesson.
sentences.zh: 他说这次经历给他上了宝贵的一课。

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是‘一种强烈的情感’？
哪个词的意思是‘追求或努力实现’？

哪个词的意思是‘解决方案或决定’？

image_prompts: A tall pilot standing in front of an airplane, smelling the air with a vast emotion on his face.
The pilot feeling a strong urge to pursue his talent, with a prior injury visible on his leg.
An enemy figure blocking the pilot's path, with a small gap in a training track.
The pilot communicating with his team online, pointing at a phrase in a manual on a screen.
A group of people appointing a new leader, with a resolution document on a table.
The pilot drinking milk to stay stable before a flight.
The pilot planning for weeks with a calendar showing many days marked.
The pilot feeling pain in his shoulder and stopping flying.
A settlement agreement signed by two people, with relieved expressions.
The pilot speaking to a class, saying that the experience taught him a lesson.
